Klasse AppConfig

java.lang.Object
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config.AppConfig
public class AppConfig extends Object
Root configuration class for the application.

This class groups all configuration sections such as genetic algorithm parameters, general settings, strategy definitions, and data input options. It is typically populated from a JSON configuration file.

    • AppConfig

      public AppConfig()

  • Methodendetails

    • isLoadedExternally

      public boolean isLoadedExternally()

    • setLoadedExternally

      public void setLoadedExternally(boolean loadedExternally)

    • getGeneral

      public AppConfig.General getGeneral()
      Returns the general configuration of the application.
      Gibt zurück:
      the general configuration, such as the selected problem type

    • setGeneral

      public void setGeneral(AppConfig.General general)
      Sets the general configuration of the application.
      Parameter:
      general - the general configuration block

    • getGeneticAlgorithm

      public AppConfig.GeneticAlgorithm getGeneticAlgorithm()
      Returns the configuration for the genetic algorithm.
      Gibt zurück:
      the genetic algorithm configuration, including population size, mutation rate, crossover rate, and generation limits

    • setGeneticAlgorithm

      public void setGeneticAlgorithm(AppConfig.GeneticAlgorithm geneticAlgorithm)
      Sets the configuration for the genetic algorithm.
      Parameter:
      geneticAlgorithm - the configuration block defining algorithm parameters

    • getStrategy

      public AppConfig.Strategy getStrategy()
      Returns the strategy configuration, defining which mutation, crossover, and selection methods should be used.
      Gibt zurück:
      the strategy configuration

    • setStrategy

      public void setStrategy(AppConfig.Strategy strategy)
      Sets the strategy configuration.
      Parameter:
      strategy - the configuration block defining mutation, crossover, and selection strategies

    • getData

      public AppConfig.Data getData()
      Returns the data, such as file paths or input sources.
      Gibt zurück:
      the data

    • setData

      public void setData(AppConfig.Data data)
      Sets the data.
      Parameter:
      data - the block defining data input settings

    • validate

      public void validate() throws ConfigurationException
      Validates the loaded configuration parameters to ensure they fall within acceptable ranges.
      Löst aus:
      ConfigurationException - if any invalid configuration is detected.
